title: 7 Natural Tinctures for Males with High Cholesterol
description: Asclepias tuberosa tinctures may help with high cholesterol due to its high content of iridoid glycosides and flavonoids, which have been shown to have a positive effect on lipid profiles. These compounds may help to reduce the levels of low-density lipoprotein (LDL) or "bad" cholesterol and increase the levels of high-density lipoprotein (HDL) or "good" cholesterol, thus improving overall cholesterol balance.
